mnemonics: VISUALIZE THE FLOW: Visualize User Interaction Storyboard - Layout, Elements, User Flow
keyPoints: Storyboards visually map user interactions with a product
They show the sequence of screens and user actions
They help identify usability issues early in the design process
commonMistakes: Making storyboards too complex with excessive detail
Focusing only on happy paths while ignoring error states
Not involving real users or stakeholders in the storyboard creation process
